title: Implement deterministic RNG streams and world hashing
summary: Add named deterministic random streams, serialization of RNG state, canonical world hashing and divergence diagnostics for replay tests.
acceptance: Random calls require an explicit named stream
RNG state survives a serialize/restore round trip
Canonical world hash ignores presentation state and object address/order accidents
A deliberately perturbed replay identifies the first divergent checkpoint

history.details: Implemented named deterministic RNG streams, serializable/restorable headless RNG state, canonical world hashing, replay divergence diagnostics, and literal determinism/replay checks; owner gates passed.
